title: Essential Mist Air Freshner Refills, Indulgent Vanilla & Cotton Fresh, Pack 6 x 20ml, Natural Essential Oils, Each Last up to 45 days
features: 20ml Fragranced Oil per Refill – Precisely filled for long-lasting performance
Long lasting – Provides up to 45 days of continuous, long-lasting fragrance per refill on low setting.
Indulgent Vanilla & Cotton Fresh – Warm sweetness balanced with crisp freshness
Infused with Scented Oils – Rich, premium fragrance experience
Pack of 6 Refills – Ideal for extended freshness
Easy to Use – Simply insert into your mist air freshener device
Perfect for living rooms, bedrooms, bathrooms, offices, and hallways, Zest Aroma helps maintain a consistently fresh and welcoming home environment.
description: Fill your home with the rich, creamy warmth of Indulgent Vanilla combined with the crisp, clean scent of Cotton Fresh. The Zest Aroma Mist Air Freshener Refills are infused with scented oils to deliver a continuous, long-lasting fragrance for up to 45 days per refill, helping create a warm, fresh, and inviting atmosphere in any room. Designed for effortless use, the sleek refill fits seamlessly into your compatible mist air freshener device, providing a steady and consistent release of fragrance. Each refill contains 20ml of fragranced oil. Please note: the bottle is manufactured in a slightly larger size by the factory to ensure safe filling, secure sealing, and optimal mist performance. The oil content remains 20ml as stated.
